name: Elite Legal Video
description: Full-service deposition videography firm serving the greater New York metropolitan area. Specializing in multi-camera depositions, real-time streaming, and synchronized video transcripts for litigation teams.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Best legal videographer we've worked with. Always on time and footage quality is impeccable.
Handled a complex multi-camera deposition flawlessly. Highly recommend.
Real-time streaming worked perfectly for our out-of-state counsel.

sentiment.summary: Consistently praised for professionalism, reliability, and high-quality video production.

name: Manhattan Deposition Services
address: 456 Park Avenue, Floor 12, New York, NY 10022
description: Premier deposition videography and court reporting services in Manhattan. Offering 4K recording, real-time feeds, and same-day delivery for high-stakes litigation.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Same-day delivery saved our trial prep. Outstanding service.
4K footage looked incredible during trial presentation.

sentiment.summary: Known for fast turnaround and premium recording quality.

name: Tri-State Legal Video
description: Serving New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut with professional deposition videography. Over 20 years of experience in federal and state court proceedings.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: 20+ years of experience shows. They know every courthouse in the tri-state area.
Scheduling could be more flexible during peak season.

sentiment.summary: Highly experienced with broad coverage area; minor scheduling flexibility concerns.
